name: XM1014 | 宁静
descriptionEn: The XM1014 is a powerful fully automatic shotgun that justifies its heftier price tag with the ability to paint a room with lead fast. It has been hand painted with the image of a woman with long hair. I'm not here for what I need; I'm here for something I want - Imogen and The Oni Part 2
descriptionZh: XM1014 是一把强大的全自动霰弹枪，其高昂的价格赋予了它高射速和室内清剿的能力。 这把武器被依据长发女士的形象进行了手绘。 我并非为所需之物而来；我为所要之物而来 -《伊莫金与鬼（下）》
